  ::view-transition-group(*),
  ::view-transition-old(*),

<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]"><strong>5개 탭으로 구성되어 있어요:</strong></p>
<ul class="[li_&amp;]:mb-0 [li_&amp;]:mt-1 [li_&amp;]:gap-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ul]:pb-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ol]:pb-1 list-disc flex flex-col gap-1 pl-8 mb-3">
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><strong>신앙</strong> — 성경 말씀, 묵상 느낀 점, 기도 제목, 기도 내용</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><strong>영어</strong> — 오늘의 영어 문장/일기</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><strong>운동</strong> — 근력운동 3종 체크(Leg Raise·정지스쿼트·플랭크), 조깅 거리·페이스·신은 운동화</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><strong>몸 상태</strong> — 몸무게, 수면시간, 컨디션, 날씨(온도·습도)</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><strong>요약</strong> — AI가 오늘의 기록 전체를 분석해서 따뜻한 격려 메시지와 함께 정리해줘요</li>
</ul>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]"><strong>사용 방법:</strong></p>
<ol class="[li_&amp;]:mb-0 [li_&amp;]:mt-1 [li_&amp;]:gap-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ul]:pb-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ol]:pb-1 list-decimal flex flex-col gap-1 pl-8 mb-3">
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">각 탭에서 오늘의 내용 입력</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">탭마다 저장 버튼 클릭</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">"요약" 탭에서 "오늘의 기록 요약하기" 클릭 → AI가 한 번에 정리</li>
</ol>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]">개선하고 싶은 부분(예: 과거 기록 보기, 특정 항목 추가 등)이 있으면 말씀해주세요!</p></div></div></div></div></div><div class="flex justify-start opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 group-focus-within:opacity-100 transition" role="group" aria-label="Message actions"><div class="text-text-300"><div class="text-text-300 flex items-stretch justify-between"><button type="button" data-cds="Button" class="cds-reset group/btn relative isolate inline-flex shrink-0 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 whitespace-nowrap select-none border-0 outline-none rounded h-control font-sans text-body font-medium [&amp;:disabled:not([aria-busy])]:opacity-50 disabled:pointer-events-none transition-shadow duration-fast focus-visible:shadow-focus text-primary aria-pressed:text-accent aspect-square w-control px-0 !text-muted hover:!text-primary" aria-label="복사" data-testid="action-bar-copy"><span aria-hidden="true" class="absolute -z-[1] rounded-[inherit] transition-colors duration-fast group-focus-visible/btn:shadow-[inset_0_0_0_1px_var(--cds-page-bg)] bg-transparent group-hover/btn:bg-fill-ghost-hover group-aria-expanded/btn:bg-fill-ghost-hover inset-0 group-aria-pressed/btn:bg-accent group-hover/btn:group-aria-pressed/btn:bg-accent cds-btn-squish "></span><span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 "><span class="relative"><span data-cds="Icon" class="transition-all opacity-100 scale-100" aria-hidden="true" style="font-family: var(--font-anthropicons, Anthropicons-Variable); opacity: 1; transform: none;"><div class="contents"><div data-is-streaming="false" class="group relative relative pb-3" style="opacity: 1; transform: none;"><h2 class="sr-only select-none">Claude 응답: 가장 현실적인 방법 세 가지를 알려드릴게요.</h2><div class="font-claude-response relative leading-[1.65rem] [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:bg-bg-000/50 [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:border-0.5 [&amp;_pre&gt;div]:border-border-400 [&amp;_.ignore-pre-bg&gt;div]:bg-transparent [&amp;_.standard-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pl-2 [&amp;_.standard-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,ul,ol,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pr-8 [&amp;_.progressive-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pl-2 [&amp;_.progressive-markdown_:is(p,blockquote,ul,ol,h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6)]:pr-8"><div><div class="standard-markdown grid-cols-1 grid [&amp;_&gt;_*]:min-w-0 gap-3 standard-markdown"><p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]">가장 현실적인 방법 세 가지를 알려드릴게요.</p>
<hr class="border-border-200 border-t-0.5 my-3 mx-1.5">
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]"><strong>방법 1 — Claude.ai 앱에서 그대로 사용 (가장 쉬움)</strong></p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]">지금 이 채팅 자체를 모바일에서 열면 바로 사용할 수 있어요. Claude 앱을 설치하고, 이 대화를 열면 앱이 그대로 작동합니다. 단, 대화를 닫으면 입력한 내용이 초기화되는 게 단점이에요.</p></div></div><div class="pl-2 pt-1 pb-2"><div class="my-3 rounded-2xl border-0.5 border-border-200 bg-bg-000 shadow-sm overflow-hidden font-ui"><div class="flex items-center gap-2 h-11 px-4 border-b-0.5 border-border-300"><span class="flex-1 min-w-0 truncate text-xs text-text-400">추천 앱 및 확장 프로그램</span><a href="https://claude.ai/downloads" class="flex-shrink-0 text-xs text-text-300 hover:text-text-100 hover:underline transition-colors">모두 보기</a></div><div class="flex flex-col gap-4 py-3"><div class="flex gap-2.5 items-center px-4"><div class="rounded-lg bg-bg-000 border-0.5 border-border-200 flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0" style="width: 36px; height: 36px;"><img alt="" width="23" height="23" loading="lazy" class="object-contain dark:hidden" src="./개인 영적·신체 관리 앱 개발 - Claude_files/apple-icon.svg" style="width: 23px; height: 23px;"><img alt="" width="23" height="23" loading="lazy" class="object-contain hidden dark:block" src="./개인 영적·신체 관리 앱 개발 - Claude_files/apple-icon-white.svg" style="width: 23px; height: 23px;"></div><div class="flex-1 min-w-0"><div class="text-sm text-text-100">iOS용 Claude</div><div class="text-xs text-text-400 line-clamp-3">핸즈프리로 채팅하고 기기 간에 대화를 동기화하세요.</div></div><div class="flex-shrink-0"><button type="button" data-cds="Button" data-size="sm" class="cds-reset group/btn relative isolate inline-flex shrink-0 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 whitespace-nowrap select-none border-0 outline-none rounded h-control font-sans text-body font-medium [&amp;:disabled:not([aria-busy])]:opacity-50 disabled:pointer-events-none transition-shadow duration-fast focus-visible:shadow-focus text-on-primary px-md"><span aria-hidden="true" class="absolute -z-[1] rounded-[inherit] transition-colors duration-fast group-focus-visible/btn:shadow-[inset_0_0_0_1px_var(--cds-page-bg)] bg-fill-primary group-hover/btn:bg-fill-primary-hover group-aria-expanded/btn:bg-fill-primary-hover inset-[0.5px] group-aria-pressed/btn:bg-accent group-hover/btn:group-aria-pressed/btn:bg-accent cds-btn-squish "></span><span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 ">다운로드</span></button></div></div><div class="flex gap-2.5 items-center px-4"><div class="rounded-lg bg-bg-000 border-0.5 border-border-200 flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0 text-text-200" style="width: 36px; <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]"><strong>방법 2 — HTML 파일로 저장해서 폰에서 열기</strong></p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]">앱 코드를 <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">.html</code> 파일로 만들어드리면, 폰 브라우저(Safari·Chrome)로 바로 열 수 있어요. 인터넷 없이도 작동하고, 홈 화면에 바로가기 아이콘도 추가할 수 있어요. 원하시면 파일로 만들어드릴게요.</p>
<hr class="border-border-200 border-t-0.5 my-3 mx-1.5">
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]"><strong>방법 3 — GitHub Pages / Vercel로 나만의 웹앱 배포 (가장 완성도 높음)</strong></p>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]">무료로 <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">https://내이름.github.io/daily-journal</code> 같은 주소를 만들어서, 어디서든 폰으로 접속할 수 있어요. 홈 화면에 추가하면 앱 아이콘처럼 사용 가능해요 (PWA).</p>
<hr class="border-border-200 border-t-0.5 my-3 mx-1.5">
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]">어떤 방법이 좋으세요? <strong>방법 2 (HTML 파일)</strong> 를 원하시면 바로 다운로드 파일로 만들어드릴게요.</p></div></div></div></div></div><div /* This file is autogenerated by Grammarly Design System */
:host {
  --elevation100-border: 1px solid var(--color-elevation-outline-default-1);
  --elevation100-shadow: 0px 1px 4px 0.5px var(--color-border-base-default-f3);

  --elevation200-border: 1px solid var(--color-elevation-outline-default-1);
  --elevation200-shadow: 0px 1px 8px 0.5px var(--color-border-base-default-f5);

  --elevation300-border: 1px solid var(--color-elevation-outline-default-1);
  --elevation300-shadow: 0px 2px 12px 0.5px var(--color-border-base-default-f5);

  --elevation-low-border: 1px solid var(--color-elevation-outline-default-1);
  --elevation-low-shadow: 0px 1px 4px 0.5px var(--color-elevation-base-default-f5);

<hr class="border-border-200 border-t-0.5 my-3 mx-1.5">
<h3 class="text-text-100 mt-3 -mb-1 text-[1.125rem] font-bold">1. 월간 요약 기능 추가</h3>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]">먼저 앱을 업그레이드할게요.</p></div></div><style>

<hr class="border-border-200 border-t-0.5 my-3 mx-1.5">
<h3 class="text-text-100 mt-3 -mb-1 text-[1.125rem] font-bold">2. GitHub Pages 무료 배포 방법</h3>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]">단계별로 따라오시면 돼요.</p>
<hr class="border-border-200 border-t-0.5 my-3 mx-1.5">
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]"><strong>① GitHub 계정 만들기</strong>
<a class="underline underline underline-offset-2 decoration-1 decoration-current/40 hover:decoration-current focus:decoration-current" href="https://github.com/">github.com</a> 에서 무료 가입</p>
<hr class="border-border-200 border-t-0.5 my-3 mx-1.5">
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]"><strong>② 새 Repository 만들기</strong></p>
<ul class="[li_&amp;]:mb-0 [li_&amp;]:mt-1 [li_&amp;]:gap-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ul]:pb-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ol]:pb-1 list-disc flex flex-col gap-1 pl-8 mb-3">
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">우측 상단 <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">+</code> → <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">New repository</code></li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Repository name: <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">daily-journal</code> (원하는 이름)</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">Public</code> 선택</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">Add a README file</code> 체크</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">Create repository</code> 클릭</li>
</ul>
<hr class="border-border-200 border-t-0.5 my-3 mx-1.5">
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]"><strong>③ HTML 파일 업로드</strong>
제가 아래에서 완성된 <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">index.html</code> 파일을 만들어드릴게요. 그 파일을 Repository에 드래그&amp;드롭으로 업로드하면 됩니다.</p>
<ul class="[li_&amp;]:mb-0 [li_&amp;]:mt-1 [li_&amp;]:gap-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ul]:pb-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ol]:pb-1 list-disc flex flex-col gap-1 pl-8 mb-3">
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Repository 페이지에서 <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">Add file</code> → <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">Upload files</code></li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">index.html</code> 파일을 드래그</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">Commit changes</code> 클릭</li>
</ul>
<hr class="border-border-200 border-t-0.5 my-3 mx-1.5">
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]"><strong>④ GitHub Pages 활성화</strong></p>
<ul class="[li_&amp;]:mb-0 [li_&amp;]:mt-1 [li_&amp;]:gap-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ul]:pb-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ol]:pb-1 list-disc flex flex-col gap-1 pl-8 mb-3">
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Repository → <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">Settings</code> → 좌측 메뉴 <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">Pages</code></li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Source: <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">Deploy from a branch</code></li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Branch: <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">main</code> / <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">/ (root)</code> 선택 후 <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">Save</code></li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">1~2분 후 <strong><code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">https://내아이디.github.io/daily-journal</code></strong> 주소 생성!</li>
</ul>

<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]"><strong>⑤ 홈 화면에 추가 (앱처럼 사용)</strong></p>

<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><strong>안드로이드</strong>: Chrome에서 주소 열기 → 우측 메뉴 → <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">홈 화면에 추가</code></li>

:host {
  --elevation100-border: 1px solid var(--color-elevation-outline-default-1);
  --elevation100-shadow: 0px 1px 4px 0.5px var(--color-border-base-default-f3);

  --elevation200-border: 1px solid var(--color-elevation-outline-default-1);
  --elevation200-shadow: 0px 1px 8px 0.5px var(--color-border-base-default-f5);

  --elevation300-border: 1px solid var(--color-elevation-outline-default-1);
  --elevation300-shadow: 0px 2px 12px 0.5px var(--color-border-base-default-f5);

  --elevation-low-border: 1px solid var(--color-elevation-outline-default-1);
  --elevation-low-shadow: 0px 1px 4px 0.5px var(--color-elevation-base-default-f5);

  --elevation-medium-border: 1px solid var(--color-elevation-outline-default-1);
  --elevation-medium-shadow: 0px 1px 8px 0.5px var(--color-elevation-base-default-f4);

  --elevation-high-border: 1px solid var(--color-elevation-outline-default-1);
  --elevation-high-shadow: 0px 2px 12px 0.5px var(--color-elevation-base-default-f3);
}

  --radius-half: calc(0.125px * var(--rem, 16));
  --radius-0: calc(0px * var(--rem, 16));
  --radius-1: calc(0.25px * var(--rem, 16));

<ul class="[li_&amp;]:mb-0 [li_&amp;]:mt-1 [li_&amp;]:gap-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ul]:pb-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ol]:pb-1 list-disc flex flex-col gap-1 pl-8 mb-3">
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><strong>Leg Raise</strong> — core / lower abs</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><strong>Static Squat</strong> (정지 스쿼트) — quads / glutes</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><strong>Plank</strong> — core / full body</li>
</ul>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]">섹션 헤더도 "근력 운동 완료 여부" → <strong>Strength Training</strong>으로 변경했고, 각 항목에 어떤 근육을 쓰는지 작게 표시해뒀어요. 체크하면 초록색으로 완료 표시되는 것도 그대로예요. 다른 수정 사항 있으면 말씀해주세요!</p></div></div></div></div></div><div class="flex justify-start opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 group-focus-within:opacity-100 transition" role="group" <h3 class="text-text-100 mt-3 -mb-1 text-[1.125rem] font-bold">GitHub Pages 배포 가이드</h3>
<h4 class="text-text-100 mt-2 -mb-1 text-base font-bold">1단계 — GitHub 가입 &amp; 저장소 만들기</h4>
<ol class="[li_&amp;]:mb-0 [li_&amp;]:mt-1 [li_&amp;]:gap-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ul]:pb-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ol]:pb-1 list-decimal flex flex-col gap-1 pl-8 mb-3">
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><a class="underline underline underline-offset-2 decoration-1 decoration-current/40 hover:decoration-current focus:decoration-current" href="https://github.com/">github.com</a> 접속 → <strong>Sign up</strong> (이미 있으면 로그인)</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">우측 상단 <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">+</code> 버튼 → <strong>New repository</strong></li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">아래처럼 설정:
<ul class="[li_&amp;]:mb-0 [li_&amp;]:mt-1 [li_&amp;]:gap-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ul]:pb-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ol]:pb-1 list-disc flex flex-col gap-1 pl-8 mb-3">
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Repository name: <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">daily-journal</code></li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><strong>Public</strong> 선택 ← 반드시 Public이어야 무료 Pages 사용 가능</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">Add a README file</code> 체크</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><strong>Create repository</strong> 클릭</li>
</ol>
<hr class="border-border-200 border-t-0.5 my-3 mx-1.5">
<h4 class="text-text-100 mt-2 -mb-1 text-base font-bold">2단계 — index.html 업로드</h4>
<ol class="[li_&amp;]:mb-0 [li_&amp;]:mt-1 [li_&amp;]:gap-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ul]:pb-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ol]:pb-1 list-decimal flex flex-col gap-1 pl-8 mb-3">
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">방금 만든 저장소 페이지에서 <strong>Add file</strong> → <strong>Upload files</strong> 클릭</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">위에서 다운로드한 <code class="bg-text-200/5 border border-0.5 border-border-300 text-danger-000 whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-[0.4rem] px-1 py-px text-[0.9rem]">index.html</code> 파일을 <strong>드래그&amp;드롭</strong></li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">하단 <strong>Commit changes</strong> 클릭</li>
</ol>
<hr class="border-border-200 border-t-0.5 my-3 mx-1.5">
<h4 class="text-text-100 mt-2 -mb-1 text-base font-bold">3단계 — GitHub Pages 활성화</h4>
<ol class="[li_&amp;]:mb-0 [li_&amp;]:mt-1 [li_&amp;]:gap-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ul]:pb-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ol]:pb-1 list-decimal flex flex-col gap-1 pl-8 mb-3">
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">저장소 상단 <strong>Settings</strong> 탭 클릭</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">왼쪽 메뉴에서 <strong>Pages</strong> 클릭</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Source를 <strong>Deploy from a branch</strong> 선택</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Branch: <strong>main</strong>, 폴더: <strong>/ (root)</strong> → <strong>Save</strong></li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">1~2분 기다리면 상단에 주소가 생성됨:</li>
</ol>
<div role="group" aria-label="코드" tabindex="0" class="relative group/copy bg-bg-000/50 border-0.5 border-border-400 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-accent-100"><div class="sticky opacity-0 group-hover/copy:opacity-100 group-focus-within/copy:opacity-100 top-2 py-2 h-12 w-0 float-right"><div class="absolute right-0 h-8 px-2 items-center inline-flex z-10"><button class="inline-flex

  isolate
  shrink-0

  disabled:opacity-50
  disabled:shadow-none
  disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent

          font-base
          duration-300

<hr class="border-border-200 border-t-0.5 my-3 mx-1.5">
<h4 class="text-text-100 mt-2 -mb-1 text-base font-bold">4단계 — 아이폰 홈 화면에 앱으로 추가</h4>
<ol class="[li_&amp;]:mb-0 [li_&amp;]:mt-1 [li_&amp;]:gap-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ul]:pb-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ol]:pb-1 list-decimal flex flex-col gap-1 pl-8 mb-3">
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">아이폰 <strong>Safari</strong>로 위 주소 접속</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">하단 <strong>공유 버튼</strong> (네모+화살표 아이콘) 탭</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2"><strong>"홈 화면에 추가"</strong> 선택</li>
<li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">이름 확인 후 <strong>추가</strong> 탭</li>
</ol>
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]">이렇게 하면 앱 아이콘이 생기고, 전체 화면으로 실행돼요. 기록은 폰 브라우저에 자동 저장됩니다.</p>
<hr class="border-border-200 border-t-0.5 my-3 mx-1.5">
<p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]">막히는 단계가 있으면 말씀해주세요!</p></div></div><div class="flex flex-col gap-2 py-2"><div class="group/artifact-block relative flex /* This file is autogenerated by Grammarly Design System */
:host {
  --elevation100-border: 1px solid var(--color-elevation-outline-default-1);
  --elevation100-shadow: 0px 1px 4px 0.5px var(--color-border-base-default-f3);

  --elevation200-border: 1px solid var(--color-elevation-outline-default-1);
  --elevation200-shadow: 0px 1px 8px 0.5px var(--color-border-base-default-f5);

  --elevation300-border: 1px solid var(--color-elevation-outline-default-1);
  --elevation300-shadow: 0px 2px 12px 0.5px var(--color-border-base-default-f5);

  --elevation-low-border: 1px solid var(--color-elevation-outline-default-1);
  --elevation-low-shadow: 0px 1px 4px 0.5px var(--color-elevation-base-default-f5);

/* This file is autogenerated by Grammarly Design System */
:host {
  --elevation100-border: 1px solid var(--color-elevation-outline-default-1);
  --elevation100-shadow: 0px 1px 4px 0.5px var(--color-border-base-default-f3);

  --elevation200-border: 1px solid var(--color-elevation-outline-default-1);
  --elevation200-shadow: 0px 1px 8px 0.5px var(--color-border-base-default-f5);

  --elevation300-border: 1px solid var(--color-elevation-outline-default-1);
  --elevation300-shadow: 0px 2px 12px 0.5px var(--color-border-base-default-f5);

  --elevation-low-border: 1px solid var(--color-elevation-outline-default-1);
  --elevation-low-shadow: 0px 1px 4px 0.5px var(--color-elevation-base-default-f5);
